bookingFee.title: Review Your Booking
bookingFee.subtitle: Please check all details carefully before confirming

breakdown.title: Price Breakdown
breakdown.microcopy: You only pay 10 DH today to reserve your bike. The rental cost and refundable deposit are paid directly to the agency at pickup.

noRefund.title: The 10 DH reservation fee is non-refundable
noRefund.body: Once you confirm this booking, the 10 DH reservation fee cannot be refunded — even if you cancel, change your mind, or do not show up at pickup. This fee compensates the agency for holding the bike for you and removing it from public availability.
noRefund.exception: Your 10 DH IS refunded only if the agency cancels, the bike becomes unavailable, or the agency fails to deliver the bike in working condition.

pickup.title: What to bring at pickup
pickup.license: Valid driver's license (category A / A2 / B as required)
pickup.deposit: Refundable security deposit (1,500 DH cash or card hold)
pickup.note: Failure to present required documents at pickup is treated as a no-show. The 10 DH reservation fee will not be refunded.

policy.title: Rental Policy Highlights
policy.fuel: Fuel: return with the same level as pickup
policy.late: Late return: 50 DH/hour after grace period

verify.title: Before confirming, please verify:
verify.bike: The bike model matches what you wanted to rent
verify.dates: Pickup and return dates and times are correct
verify.location: Pickup location is convenient for you
verify.license: You hold the required license category
verify.note: Mistakes in booking details are treated as client cancellation — the 10 DH reservation fee will not be refunded.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.q1: Why is there a 10 DH reservation fee?
faq.a1: The 10 DH compensates the agency for holding your bike and removing it from public availability for the dates you selected. It guarantees the bike is reserved exclusively for you.
faq.q2: Is the 10 DH counted toward the rental price?
faq.a2: No. The 10 DH is a separate reservation fee. The full rental cost is paid directly to the agency at pickup.
faq.q3: What if I cancel my booking?
faq.a3: The 10 DH reservation fee is non-refundable — regardless of when you cancel or the reason. The rental cost is not charged because nothing has been paid to the agency yet.
faq.q4: What is the security deposit for?
faq.a4: The deposit (around 1,500 DH) is held by the agency in cash or as a card hold to cover any damage, late return, or fuel difference. It is fully refunded at the end of the rental if the bike is returned in the same condition.
faq.q5: What happens if the agency cancels?
faq.a5: If the agency cancels, the bike becomes unavailable, or the bike is delivered in non-working condition, you receive a full refund of the 10 DH plus any other charges.
faq.q6: What if I need to change my dates?
faq.a6: Date changes depend on bike availability and must be arranged directly with the agency before pickup. If new dates aren't possible, the original 10 DH reservation fee remains non-refundable.
faq.q7: Can I extend my rental on the spot?
faq.a7: Yes, if the bike is still available you can extend directly with the agency at the same daily rate. Extensions are paid in cash or by card to the agency, not through the platform.
faq.q8: What if the bike has a problem during my rental?
faq.a8: Contact the agency immediately. Verified agencies are required to provide assistance, a replacement bike, or a partial refund depending on the situation. Always document the issue with photos.
faq.q9: Do I need an international driver's license?
faq.a9: Foreign visitors should carry both their national driver's license and an International Driving Permit (IDP). Moroccan residents only need a valid Moroccan license of the correct category.

ack.label: I have read and understood that the 10 DH reservation fee is non-refundable.

cta.terms: By confirming, you agree to our Terms of Service and Cancellation Policy.

bookingFeeInfo.title: Understanding the 10 DH Booking Fee
bookingFeeInfo.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how our reservation fee works.

hero.headline: When you book a bike with us, you pay a small 10 DH reservation fee to lock in your booking.
hero.support: It's quick, transparent, and helps both you and the rental agency.

covers.title: What does the 10 DH fee cover?

reserve.title: Reserves your bike
reserve.body: Your chosen bike is locked just for you and removed from availability for other renters.

confirm.title: Confirms your booking with the agency
confirm.body: The agency receives your booking instantly and prepares your bike for pickup.

protect.title: Protects the agency's time
protect.body: Agencies trust the booking is real and won't be a no-show, so they can plan their day.

isNot.title: What the fee is NOT
isNot.partOfRental: It is NOT part of the rental cost.
isNot.deposit: It is NOT a deposit you get back.
isNot.hidden: It is NOT a hidden charge — it's shown upfront, every time.
isNot.profit: It is NOT paid to the platform as profit only — most goes to the agency.

refund.title: Is the 10 DH refundable?
refund.statement: No — the 10 DH booking fee is non-refundable.
refund.explanation: Once you book, the agency holds the bike for you and turns away other potential renters. That's why this small fee cannot be returned, even if you cancel or change your mind.

refundCases.unavailable: The bike becomes unavailable before pickup.
refundCases.notWorking: The agency fails to deliver the bike in working condition.

why.title: Why such a small fee?
why.body: We kept it intentionally low — just 10 DH — so booking a bike feels easy and accessible to everyone. It's enough to make bookings serious, but small enough to never be a barrier.
why.comparison: Less than the price of a coffee — and it secures your ride for days.

fits.title: Where does the 10 DH fit in my total?
fits.note: You only pay the 10 DH online. Everything else is handled directly with the rental agency at pickup.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.q1: Why do I have to pay before pickup?
faq.a1: Paying online confirms that your booking is real and instantly notifies the agency to reserve the bike for you. Without it, agencies can't trust the booking enough to hold the bike.
faq.q2: Can I avoid the 10 DH fee?
faq.a2: No — the 10 DH applies to every booking on our platform. It's the same for everyone and is what makes it possible to reserve a bike instantly.
faq.q3: What if I change my booking dates?
faq.a3: Date changes depend on bike availability and must be arranged with the agency before pickup. The original 10 DH stays with the booking and is not charged again.
faq.q4: Is the 10 DH the same for every bike?
faq.a4: Yes — whether you book a scooter or a high-end sport bike, the booking fee is always 10 DH. Only the daily rental price changes.
faq.q5: Who receives the 10 DH — the platform or the agency?
faq.a5: Most of the 10 DH goes to the agency to compensate them for reserving the bike. A small portion covers the platform's payment processing and operating costs.
faq.q6: Is this fee legal in Morocco?
faq.a6: Yes. The 10 DH is a transparent, disclosed reservation fee shown before any booking is confirmed. Both you and the agency agree to it as part of the rental terms.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our service

faqItems.q1: What documents do I need to rent a motorbike?
faqItems.a1: You need a valid ID card (Moroccan CIN or passport) and must complete our verification process. Your documents will be verified before your first rental.
faqItems.q2: Do you offer delivery and pickup?
faqItems.a2: Yes! We offer free delivery and pickup within Casablanca city limits for rentals of 3 days or more. For shorter rentals, a small delivery fee may apply.
faqItems.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faqItems.a3: We accept cash payment upon delivery, bank transfers, and mobile payments. A security deposit of 700 DH is required and will be refunded when you return the bike in good condition.
faqItems.a4: You can cancel your booking up to 24 hours before the pickup time for a full refund. Cancellations within 24 hours may be subject to a cancellation fee.
faqItems.a5: Yes, we require a refundable security deposit of 700 DH. This will be returned to you when you return the motorbike in the same condition.
faqItems.q6: What is the minimum age to rent?
faqItems.a6: You must be at least 18 years old with a valid ID to rent a motorbike from us.
faqItems.q7: Can I extend my rental period?
faqItems.a7: Yes, you can extend your rental by contacting us before your return date. Extensions are subject to availability and will be charged at the daily rate.
faqItems.q8: What happens if there is a breakdown or emergency?
faqItems.a8: We provide 24/7 roadside assistance. Simply call our support line and we will help you immediately. We also offer replacement bikes in case of mechanical issues.

becomeBusiness.heroSubtitle: Join Morocco's fastest-growing motorbike rental platform. We bring clients, handle operations, and let you focus on your bikes.
becomeBusiness.dailyStruggles: These are the daily struggles of motorbike rental businesses
becomeBusiness.problem1: Bikes stay parked all day with no rentals
becomeBusiness.problem2: You depend only on tourists, foot traffic, or hotel partners
becomeBusiness.problem3: High rent for fancy location, but bikes don't go out every day
becomeBusiness.problem4: Wasting time filling contracts by hand
becomeBusiness.problem5: Worry about bad clients, fake IDs, theft, and accidents
becomeBusiness.problem6: Dealing with police, insurance, and angry clients alone
becomeBusiness.heavyLifting: We Do the Heavy Lifting for You
becomeBusiness.heavyLiftingDesc: We connect rental shops, individual owners, and clients in one smart system. We become your growth engine and support team.
becomeBusiness.benefit1Desc: We handle online marketing, ads, and partnerships. You don't need expensive advertising - just focus on your bikes.
becomeBusiness.benefit2Desc: See all bookings in real-time, track earnings per day/bike/month, manage your entire fleet in one place.
becomeBusiness.benefit3Desc: No more handwritten contracts. Professional contracts with client details, bike info, dates, and conditions - printed instantly.
becomeBusiness.benefit4Desc: Every renter must upload their ID. Our team verifies to reduce fake accounts and risky renters.
becomeBusiness.benefit5Desc: GPS devices on bikes, coordination with police for theft, and our motor team for on-ground incidents.
becomeBusiness.benefit6Desc: Major incident protection to reduce financial shock from accidents or theft.
becomeBusiness.benefit7Desc: Your clients can call us anytime. We handle communication and problem-solving.
becomeBusiness.benefit8Desc: Monthly, quarterly, and yearly rewards. Top sellers can access funding up to 10,000 USD to grow.
becomeBusiness.focusOnBikes: You focus on the bikes. We focus on everything around the bikes.
becomeBusiness.yourJob1: Buy and maintain good, safe motorbikes
becomeBusiness.yourJob2: Keep your bikes ready to rent
becomeBusiness.yourJob3: Deliver and receive bikes from clients
becomeBusiness.yourJob4: Work legally (auto-entrepreneur or rental company license)
becomeBusiness.ourJob7: Help with incidents, theft, and accidents
becomeBusiness.simpleCommissionDesc: We only earn when you earn. Longer rentals = lower commission.

becomeBusiness.verificationRequiredDesc: To become a business partner, you must first verify your identity. This helps us maintain a trusted network of partners.
becomeBusiness.ourGoal: Our goal is to help you get long-term, high-value bookings and grow your business.

aboutPage.title: About Motonita
aboutPage.subtitle: Morocco's leading motorbike rental marketplace, connecting riders with trusted rental partners across the country.
aboutPage.ourStoryContent: Founded in October 2025, Motonita was born from a simple observation: renting a motorbike in Morocco was complicated, time-consuming, and often unreliable. We set out to change that by creating a platform that makes it easy for anyone to find, book, and ride quality motorbikes across Morocco's beautiful cities and landscapes.
aboutPage.ourMissionDesc: To make motorbike rentals accessible, safe, and convenient for everyone in Morocco.
aboutPage.communityFirstDesc: We prioritize building a trusted community of riders and rental partners.
aboutPage.safetySecurityDesc: Every bike and rider is verified, insured, and protected by our platform.
aboutPage.customerSatisfactionDesc: Your experience is our priority. We're here to help 24/7.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.introductionContent: At Motonita.ma, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our motorbike rental platform.
privacyPage.informationCollectedContent: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a booking, or contact us. This includes: name, email address, phone number, ID card information, profile photos, and payment information.
privacyPage.howWeUseContent: We use the information we collect to: process your bookings, verify your identity, communicate with you, improve our services, and ensure platform safety.
privacyPage.dataSecurityContent: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacyPage.dataSharingContent: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with rental partners to fulfill your bookings, and with service providers who assist our operations.
privacyPage.yourRightsContent: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also object to processing or request data portability. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacyPage.dataRetentionContent: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.
privacyPage.cookiesContent: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, analyze usage, and assist in our marketing efforts.
privacyPage.childrensPrivacyContent: Our services are not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect information from children.
privacyPage.policyChangesContent: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.
privacyPage.contactUsContent: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at contact@motonita.ma.

termsPage.title: Terms & Conditions
termsPage.agreementToTermsContent: By accessing or using Motonita.ma, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
termsPage.rentalRequirementsContent: To rent a motorbike, you must: be at least 18 years old, possess a valid Moroccan ID card (CIN) or passport, complete our identity verification process, and agree to our rental terms.
termsPage.bookingPaymentContent: All bookings are subject to availability. Payment can be made via cash on delivery, bank transfer, or mobile payment. A security deposit of 700 DH is required for all rentals.
termsPage.cancellationPolicyContent: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup. Cancellations within 24 hours may incur a fee. No-shows will be charged the full rental amount.
termsPage.renterResponsibilitiesContent: Renters are responsible for: operating the motorbike safely and legally, returning the bike in the same condition, reporting any damage or issues immediately, and adhering to traffic laws.
termsPage.damageAndLiabilityContent: Renters are liable for any damage to the motorbike during the rental period. Damage costs will be deducted from the security deposit or charged separately.
termsPage.insuranceCoverageContent: Basic insurance is included with all rentals. Additional coverage options are available. Insurance does not cover damage caused by negligence or illegal activities.
termsPage.lateReturnsContent: Late returns will be charged at the daily rate. Please contact us if you need to extend your rental period.
termsPage.prohibitedUsesContent: Motorbikes may not be used for: illegal activities, racing or reckless driving, transport of hazardous materials, or subletting to third parties.
termsPage.accountTerminationContent: We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate our terms, engage in fraudulent activity, or pose a safety risk to our community.
termsPage.disputeResolutionContent: Any disputes will be resolved through negotiation. If unresolved, disputes will be subject to the jurisdiction of Moroccan courts.
termsPage.changesToTermsContent: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
termsPage.contactUsContent: For questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at contact@motonita.ma.

cookiesPage.title: Cookies Policy
cookiesPage.whatAreCookiesContent: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our platform.
cookiesPage.howWeUseCookiesContent: We use cookies to: keep you signed in, remember your language preferences, analyze site traffic, personalize content, and improve our services.
cookiesPage.essentialCookiesContent: Required for the website to function properly. Cannot be disabled.
cookiesPage.analyticsCookiesContent: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
cookiesPage.thirdPartyCookiesContent: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages, such as analytics providers and payment processors.
cookiesPage.localStorageContent: We also use local storage to save your language preference and session information for a better user experience.
cookiesPage.cookieDurationContent: Session cookies are deleted when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them.
cookiesPage.managingCookiesContent: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.
cookiesPage.policyUpdatesContent: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
cookiesPage.contactUsContent: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at contact@motonita.ma.

gpsTracking.title: Smart GPS Tracking
gpsTracking.subtitle: Advanced tracking technology launching soon
gpsTracking.realTimeLocationDesc: Track your rented bike's location in real-time through our app.
gpsTracking.theftProtectionDesc: GPS tracking helps recover stolen bikes quickly and efficiently.
gpsTracking.tripHistoryDesc: Review your complete riding history and routes taken.
gpsTracking.alertsDesc: Get instant alerts for any unusual activity or geofence violations.
gpsTracking.paragraph1: All our motorbikes are equipped with state-of-the-art GPS tracking devices that provide real-time location data.
gpsTracking.paragraph2: For renters, this means you can always find your parked bike and review your trips. For owners, it provides an additional layer of security and helps monitor bike usage.
gpsTracking.paragraph3: Our GPS system complies with all Moroccan privacy laws and data protection regulations.

insurances.title: Insurance Coverage
insurances.subtitle: We've got you covered
insurances.fundDescription: Annual collective fund for major incidents
insurances.fundDetails: This fund covers major incidents beyond standard coverage, providing peace of mind for both renters and owners.
insurances.note1: A deductible of 500-1000 MAD may apply depending on the incident type
insurances.note2: Coverage excludes damage caused by reckless driving, driving under influence, or illegal activities
insurances.note3: Additional premium coverage available on request

paymentSelection.cardBenefit2: Deposit held on card, returned after rental
paymentSelection.depositExplanation: A refundable security deposit of 700 DH is required. It will be returned when you return the motorbike in good condition.

referPage.meta_desc: Invite your friends to Motonita and both get 20 MAD in credits when they book their first motorbike rental. Free to join, no cash payouts, simple sharing.
referPage.subhead: Share your link with friends. When they book their first motorbike on Motonita, you both get 20 MAD in Motonita Credits — usable on your next rental.
referPage.cta_caption: Free to join · No cash payouts · Credits expire in 6 months
referPage.step1_desc: Sign up or log in to Motonita. Your unique referral link appears in your account.
referPage.step2_desc: Send the link via WhatsApp, SMS, or any messaging app. Or share it on social media.
referPage.step3_desc: When your friend completes their first rental, you both earn 20 MAD in Motonita Credits automatically.
referPage.b1_desc: Earn credits every time a friend completes their first rental through your link. No limit on how many friends you can invite.
referPage.b2_desc: Credits are added to your Motonita Credit balance automatically as soon as your friend's first rental is confirmed.
referPage.b3_desc: Your friend also gets 20 MAD off their first booking. Everyone wins.
referPage.b4_desc: Credits are valid for 6 months from the date earned. Use them on any motorbike rental across Morocco.
referPage.credits_intro: Motonita Credits are used to pay the 10 MAD booking fee on your rentals. They can also reduce the deposit you pay to agencies at pickup, depending on the agency's policy.
referPage.credits_are_2: Usable on any verified motorbike listing
referPage.credits_are_3: Transferable across cities — use them anywhere in Morocco
referPage.credits_are_4: Valid for 6 months from the date earned
referPage.faq_q1: How do I get my referral link?
referPage.faq_a1: Once you've signed up or logged in to Motonita, visit your account settings. You'll find your unique referral link ready to copy and share.
referPage.faq_q2: When do I get my 20 MAD credit?
referPage.faq_a2: You earn 20 MAD in Motonita Credits the moment your friend completes their first rental through your link. The friend must use your specific link when signing up.
referPage.faq_q3: Is there a limit to how many friends I can refer?
referPage.faq_a3: No limit. Invite as many friends as you like. The more who book, the more credits you earn.
referPage.faq_q4: Can I convert my credits to cash?
referPage.faq_a4: No. Motonita Credits are platform-only and cannot be withdrawn as cash, transferred to other accounts, or exchanged for other rewards. They're applied automatically to your future bookings.
referPage.faq_a5: Credits are valid for 6 months from the date you earn them. Unused credits expire after that period.
referPage.faq_a6: A successful referral happens when your friend signs up using your link AND completes their first confirmed rental. Cancelled bookings or no-shows do not count.
referPage.faq_a7: Businesses (rental agencies) have their own referral program coming soon — agency owners will earn credits by bringing other agencies onto Motonita. Stay tuned.
referPage.faq_q8: What if my friend already has a Motonita account?
referPage.faq_a8: Referral credits only apply to new users. If your friend already has an account, they're not eligible to become your referral — but they can still benefit from Motonita's regular pricing.
referPage.cta_sub: It takes 30 seconds. Share your link and earn on every friend who rides.
referPage.cta_help: Need help? Contact us at contact@motonita.ma
referPage.toast_placeholder: Your referral link will appear here once the dashboard is complete
